articles.title: Israeli military says Hezbollah targets struck in Beirut
articles.description: Israel says it targeted the Iran-backed armed group Hezbollah, as Tehran warns this could derail a US-Iran deal to end the fighting.

articles.title: Assisted dying returns to parliament as MP urges peers to 'finish the job'
articles.description: Lauren Edwards says she will bring the exact same bill which was narrowly passed by the Commons but ran out of time in the Lords.

articles.title: Royal Marines board Russian shadow fleet oil tanker in English Channel
articles.description: Marines were joined by National Crime Agency officers in the six-hour long operation in the early hours of Sunday.

articles.title: Roy Hattersley, former Labour deputy leader, dies aged 93
articles.description: Sir Keir Starmer said Lord Hattersley "was a giant of the Labour movement".
